action_instruction: Opening the Sign up form tab
intent: PRIMARY: Sign up tab; role=tab; text="Sign up"
generated_code:
async def run_test():
    try:
        _loc_1 = page.locator("internal:role=tab[name=\"Sign up\"i]")
        await capture_visual_context(_loc_1)
        await _loc_1.click()
    except Exception:
        await page.mouse.click(865, 365)
        set_visual_context(865, 365)
rationale: The Sign up tab is present and should be selected to show the registration form before entering details. Clicking it ensures the sign-up form is active.
